pr.title: [WIP] Add plan for transforming recipe editor into block-based interface
pr.body:
Cloud agent has begun work on **local** and will update this pull request as work progresses.

<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> local
> 
> <analysis>
> 1. **Chronological Review**: The conversation began with the user requesting a plan to transform the current recipe editor into a Scratch-like block-based editor. The user specified features such as a sidebar for available cards, drag-and-drop functionality, and a "snap" feature for cards. The user also requested the implementation of a portal card that connects chains of logic while preventing infinite loops. The conversation progressed to the agent preparing to create a detailed implementation plan using the Superpower skill.
> 
> 2. **Intent Mapping**: 
>    - User Request: "Create a plan to change the current recipe editor into a Scratch-like block based editor."
>    - User Request: "There should be a side bar with all the cards available, and drag and drop implementation."
>    - User Request: "The cards should be able to 'snap' in place."
>    - User Request: "There should also be a portal card implemented."
> 
> 3. **Technical Inventory**: 
>    - Block-based editor: A visual programming interface similar to Scratch.
>    - Drag-and-drop functionality: Allowing users to rearrange blocks/cards.
>    - Snap-to-grid feature: Ensuring cards align correctly.
>    - Portal card: A special card that connects two chains of logic.
> 
> 4. **Code Archaeology**: No specific files or code changes were discussed yet, as the conversation focused on planning the implementation.
> 
> 5. **Progress Assessment**: The user has outlined the requirements for the new editor but no implementation has begun yet.
> 
> 6. **Context Validation**: All critical information for continuation is captured, including user requirements and desired features.
> 
> 7. **Recent Commands Analysis**: The last agent command was to summarize the conversation history, triggered by the user's request for a detailed plan. The agent was preparing to outline the implementation plan using the Superpower skill when the token budget was exceeded.
> 
> </analysis>
> 
> <summary>
> 1. Conversation Overview:
> - Primary Objectives: "Create a plan to change the current recipe editor into a Scratch-like block based editor." The user also specified features like a sidebar, drag-and-drop functionality, and a portal card.
> - Session Context: The conversation focused on transforming the recipe editor into a block-based interface, detailing specific features and functionality.
> - User Intent Evolution: The user clearly defined their requirements for the new editor, emphasizing the need for a visual programming approach.
> 
> 2. Technical Foundation:
> - Block-based editor: A visual programming interface similar to Scratch, aimed at enhancing user interaction.
> - Drag-and-drop functionality: Essential for user-friendly manipulation of cards.
> - Snap-to-grid feature: Ensures cards align correctly for logical flow.
> - Portal card: A unique card that connects two chains of logic while preventing infinite loops.
> 
> 3. Codebase Status:
> - No specific files or code changes have been discussed yet, as the focus has been on planning.
>
